title: Create: Polymer
description: Integrates the Rubber Tree and Rubber components from Tech Reborn into Create’s progression, as an alternative to Kelp in relevant recipes.
body:
About

This mod adds the Rubber Tree and related items from Tech Reborn (MIT License) and integrate them into Create's progression.

Rubber Trees generate in all Overworld biomes. Sap will occasionally drip from the trunk, and can be harvested manually using a Treetap or automated with standard Create tree farms.

Rubber can be used as an alternative to Kelp in relevant recipes (Belts, Funnels, etc), providing more items per craft. This gives more opportunities for automation without replacing existing methods.

Preview

Credits

All custom textures used (if any) are either created by me or have a license that allows modification and distribution.

I make every effort to comply with project license obligations and to always credit the original owners. If you believe your name is missing from the credits or if you decide to change your project's license, please contact me.

Credits:
- Tech Reborn (MIT License) for the textures.

Dependencies

This mod requires Create.

JEI is recommended for recipes but not required.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the CurseForge launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
